sthirī—√bhū P. -bhavati, to become firm or stiff or hard,  R. ;  Suśr. ;
to compose one's self, take courage,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.

sthirībhū (sthira + 1. bhū), ˚bhavati
1〉 steif werden: gātrāṇi  R. 3,78,9 . ˚bhūta hart —, fest geworden  SUŚR. 1,265,10 . 305,6 .
— 2〉 zunehmen, a˚ abnehmen: ojaḥ  SUŚR. 1,323,20 .
— 3〉 Muth fassen, gutes Muths werden  MBH. 7,3764 . 15,1019 .  R. 2,26,27 .  ŚUK. in LA. (III) 36,20 .
